tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP"
set protocol ICMP
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "deny_icmp_outbound"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ICMP"
set logtraffic all
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "allow_outbound_web_dns"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config system interface
edit "port2"
set allowaccess ping
next
end
config system session-ttl
set default 3600
end
config system dos-policy
edit 1
set status enable
set interface "port1"
set srcip {192.168.1.3}
set action block
set block-period 60
set udp enable
set icmp enable
next
end"}
